column1: 1,Module Setup,Define modules with explicit imports/providers/exports,"Every feature should be encapsulated in a module using @Module decorator. Declare providers for DI, imports for dependent modules, and exports for shared providers.",Use @Module with clearly separated imports/providers/exports arrays,Dump all providers into AppModule or forget to export shared providers,"import { Module } from '@nestjs/common'
// BAD: PrismaService duplicated instead of importing PrismaModule
// BAD: Not exporting UsersService when other modules need it

2,Controller,Use @Controller with RESTful route decorators,"Controllers handle incoming requests and return responses. Use route decorators (@Get, @Post, etc.) and keep controllers thin by delegating logic to services.",Keep controllers thin and use proper HTTP method decorators with route params,Put business logic in controllers or use raw strings for status codes,"import { Controller, Get, Post, Body, Param, HttpCode, HttpStatus } from '@nestjs/common'
// BAD: Using raw req/res, business logic in controller, direct DB access
async create(@Req() req: Request, @Res() res: Response) {
const user = await this.prisma.user.create({ data: req.body })

3,Provider/Service,Use @Injectable services for business logic,"Services contain business logic and are injected into controllers via constructor injection. Mark them with @Injectable and register as providers in their module.",Encapsulate business logic in @Injectable services with single responsibility,Mix data access and business logic without separation,"import { Injectable, NotFoundException } from '@nestjs/common'
const user = await this.prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { id } })
if (!user) throw new NotFoundException(`User ${id} not found`)
}","// BAD: No @Injectable, no error handling, no typing

4,Pipes,Use validation pipes with class-validator or Zod,"Pipes transform and validate incoming data before it reaches the handler. Use ValidationPipe globally or per-route with class-validator decorators or Zod schemas.",Enable global ValidationPipe with whitelist and transform options,Accept raw unvalidated input or validate manually in controllers,"import { ValidationPipe } from '@nestjs/common'

5,Guards,Use @UseGuards for authentication and authorization,"Guards determine whether a request should be handled by the route handler. Use them for auth checks, role-based access, and other pre-handler validations.",Implement CanActivate interface and use @UseGuards decorator,Check auth manually inside each route handler,"import { Injectable, CanActivate, ExecutionContext } from '@nestjs/common'
// BAD: Manual auth check in every handler

6,Interceptors,Use interceptors for logging and response transformation,"Interceptors add extra logic before/after method execution. Use them for logging, caching, response mapping, and timing without polluting business logic.",Implement NestInterceptor for cross-cutting concerns,Add logging or transformation logic directly in every handler,"import { Injectable, NestInterceptor, ExecutionContext, CallHandler, Logger } from '@nestjs/common'
// BAD: Logging duplicated in every handler

7,Exception Filters,Use @Catch for custom error handling,"Exception filters catch unhandled exceptions and transform them into user-friendly responses. Use HttpException subclasses and custom filters for consistent error shapes.",Create custom exception filters implementing ExceptionFilter interface,Throw raw Error objects or catch exceptions with try-catch in every handler,"import { ExceptionFilter, Catch, ArgumentsHost, HttpException, HttpStatus, Logger } from '@nestjs/common'
// BAD: Manual try-catch in every handler, inconsistent error shape

8,DTOs,Define DTOs with class-validator decorators for input validation,"Data Transfer Objects define the shape of incoming data. Use class-validator decorators for automatic validation when combined with ValidationPipe.",Create separate DTOs for create/update operations with proper decorators,Use raw interfaces or any type for request bodies,"import { IsEmail, IsString, MinLength, IsOptional } from 'class-validator'
}","// BAD: No validation, no type safety
// Interfaces cannot be validated at runtime by ValidationPipe

9,Custom Decorators,Use createParamDecorator for reusable param extractors,"Custom decorators reduce boilerplate by extracting common parameter logic. Use createParamDecorator for request-derived data like current user.",Create typed custom decorators for frequently extracted request data,Repeat the same extraction logic across multiple handlers,"import { createParamDecorator, ExecutionContext } from '@nestjs/common'
(data: keyof AuthUser | undefined, ctx: ExecutionContext): AuthUser | any => {
// BAD: Duplicated extraction logic, no type safety

10,Dependency Injection,Use constructor injection with proper scoping,"NestJS DI system resolves dependencies via constructor parameters. Use standard constructor injection for singletons and understand request-scoped providers when needed.",Use constructor injection and let NestJS resolve dependencies automatically,"Instantiate dependencies manually with new, or use property injection without clear reason","import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common'
// BAD: Manual instantiation bypasses DI, untestable, no lifecycle mgmt

11,Configuration,Use @nestjs/config with Zod schema validation,"Centralize configuration using ConfigModule with validation to fail fast on missing or invalid environment variables at startup.",Validate all env vars at startup with a Zod schema and use ConfigService for access,Access process.env directly throughout the codebase,"import { z } from 'zod'
// BAD: Direct process.env access, no validation, no type safety
// Missing env var only discovered at runtime when used

12,Database (Prisma),Provide PrismaClient as a NestJS service with proper lifecycle,"Wrap PrismaClient in an @Injectable service that implements OnModuleInit for connection and enableShutdownHooks for graceful cleanup.",Create a dedicated PrismaModule with PrismaService extending PrismaClient,Create new PrismaClient instances in every service or import it globally without a module,"import { Injectable, OnModuleInit } from '@nestjs/common'
export class PrismaService extends PrismaClient implements OnModuleInit {
// BAD: New PrismaClient per service = multiple connections, no lifecycle

13,Authentication,Use @nestjs/passport with JWT strategy,"Implement authentication using Passport strategies. JwtStrategy validates tokens and attaches user to request. Combine with AuthGuard for route protection.",Use PassportStrategy with JwtStrategy and a dedicated AuthModule,Implement raw JWT verification logic in every guard or controller,"import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common'
// BAD: Raw JWT handling, hardcoded secret, no strategy pattern

14,Authorization (RBAC),Implement role-based access with a roles guard and metadata,"Use SetMetadata to attach required roles to handlers and a RolesGuard to check them. Combine with Reflector for metadata access.",Use custom @Roles decorator with SetMetadata and a RolesGuard using Reflector,Hardcode role checks inside controller methods,"import { SetMetadata, Injectable, CanActivate, ExecutionContext } from '@nestjs/common'
export const Roles = (...roles: string[]) => SetMetadata(ROLES_KEY, roles)
// Usage: @Roles('admin') @UseGuards(AuthGuard, RolesGuard)","import { Controller, Get, Req } from '@nestjs/common'
// BAD: Hardcoded role check in every handler

15,Swagger/OpenAPI,Decorate controllers and DTOs with @nestjs/swagger,"Use @ApiTags, @ApiOperation, @ApiResponse on controllers and @ApiProperty on DTOs to generate accurate OpenAPI documentation automatically.",Add Swagger decorators to all public endpoints and DTOs,Rely on auto-inference alone or skip API documentation entirely,"import { Controller, Get, Post, Body } from '@nestjs/common'
import { ApiTags, ApiOperation, ApiResponse, ApiProperty } from '@nestjs/swagger'
// BAD: No Swagger decorators, no documentation generated

16,Middleware,Apply middleware using consumer.apply().forRoutes(),"Middleware runs before route handlers and guards. Use functional or class-based middleware for tasks like request logging, CORS, or header manipulation.",Use NestMiddleware class or function with proper forRoutes configuration,Use Express middleware directly in main.ts for everything or duplicate logic,"import { Injectable, NestMiddleware, Logger } from '@nestjs/common'
// BAD: All middleware shoved into main.ts, not composable

17,CQRS,Separate commands and queries with @nestjs/cqrs,"Use the CQRS pattern to separate read and write operations. Commands mutate state, queries read state, and events communicate side effects.",Use CommandBus/QueryBus with dedicated handlers for each operation,Mix read and write logic in a single service method,"import { CommandHandler, ICommandHandler, QueryHandler, IQueryHandler } from '@nestjs/cqrs'
// BAD: Single method mixes command and query concerns

18,Microservices,Use @nestjs/microservices with typed message patterns,"Build microservices using NestJS transport layers (TCP, Redis, NATS, etc.). Define message patterns with @MessagePattern and event patterns with @EventPattern.",Use @MessagePattern/@EventPattern decorators with strongly typed payloads,Use raw HTTP calls between services or untyped message patterns,"import { Controller } from '@nestjs/common'
// BAD: Direct HTTP calls between services, no transport abstraction

19,WebSocket Gateway,Use @WebSocketGateway with typed events,"Implement real-time communication using WebSocket gateways. Use @SubscribeMessage for event handling and proper namespace/room management.",Use @WebSocketGateway with @SubscribeMessage and proper typing for events,Use raw ws/socket.io library without NestJS integration,"import {
// BAD: Raw socket.io without NestJS lifecycle, DI, or guards

column2:
,warning,https://docs.nestjs.com/websockets/gateways
20,Testing,Use Test.createTestingModule for isolated unit tests,Create testing modules with overridden providers to isolate units under test. Use Jest with NestJS testing utilities for both unit and e2e tests.",Use createTestingModule with mocked dependencies for unit tests,Test with real database connections or without proper module setup,"import { Test, TestingModule } from '@nestjs/testing'

column1: it('should find a user by id', async () => {
// BAD: No testing module, real dependencies, no isolation

column2:
,error,https://docs.nestjs.com/fundamentals/testing
21,Health Check,Use @nestjs/terminus for health check endpoints,Implement health checks using @nestjs/terminus to expose /health endpoints for load balancers, Kubernetes probes, and monitoring systems.",Use HealthCheckService with typed indicators (Prisma, HTTP, disk, memory),Create custom health endpoints that return 200 without actually checking dependencies,"import { Controller, Get } from '@nestjs/common'

column1: import { HealthCheck, HealthCheckService, HttpHealthIndicator, HealthCheckResult } from '@nestjs/terminus'
// BAD: Always returns OK without checking actual dependencies

22,Task Scheduling,Use @nestjs/schedule with @Cron for scheduled tasks,"Implement recurring jobs using @nestjs/schedule. Use @Cron with cron expressions or @Interval for repeated tasks with proper error handling.",Use @Cron decorator with named jobs and proper error handling,Use setInterval or external cron without NestJS integration,"import { Injectable, Logger } from '@nestjs/common'
// BAD: Raw setInterval, no lifecycle management, no error handling
await prisma.session.deleteMany({ where: { expiresAt: { lt: new Date() } } })

23,Event Emitter,Use @nestjs/event-emitter for decoupled event handling,"Emit and handle domain events to decouple modules. Use typed events with @OnEvent for loose coupling between features.",Define typed event classes and use @OnEvent with async handlers,Call services directly across module boundaries creating tight coupling,"import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common'
// BAD: Tight coupling to multiple unrelated services

24,Lifecycle Hooks,Implement OnModuleInit and OnModuleDestroy for resource management,"Use NestJS lifecycle hooks to initialize resources on startup and clean them up on shutdown. Essential for database connections, caches, and external clients.",Implement OnModuleInit/OnModuleDestroy interfaces for proper resource lifecycle,Initialize resources in constructors or forget to clean up on shutdown,"import { Injectable, OnModuleInit, OnModuleDestroy, Logger } from '@nestjs/common'
export class RedisService implements OnModuleInit, OnModuleDestroy {
// BAD: Connection in constructor, no cleanup, no error handling
// Connection never closed on shutdown -> resource leak

25,Circular Dependency,Use forwardRef() to resolve circular dependencies,"When two providers depend on each other, use forwardRef() to break the circular reference. Better yet, refactor to eliminate circular deps when possible.",Use forwardRef() as a last resort and prefer restructuring to remove circularity,Ignore circular dependency warnings or restructure modules to hide the cycle,"import { Injectable, Inject, forwardRef } from '@nestjs/common'
const user = await this.prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { id: userId } })
// BETTER: Extract shared logic into a third service to eliminate the cycle","import { Injectable } from '@nestjs/common'
// BAD: Circular dependency with no resolution -> runtime error
// Error: Nest cannot create the UsersService instance.
